title: Welcome to Our Blog
content: This is our first blog post. We're excited to share our journey with you! This platform will be used to share technical insights, tutorials, and industry news.

title: Getting Started with TypeScript
content: TypeScript is a typed superset of JavaScript that compiles to plain JavaScript. It offers classes, modules, and interfaces to help you build robust components. In this tutorial, we'll cover the basics...

title: Database Design Best Practices
content: Designing a good database schema is crucial for application performance. In this article, we'll discuss normalization, indexing strategies, and common pitfalls to avoid when designing your database.

title: Introduction to Prisma
content: Prisma is a next-generation ORM for Node.js and TypeScript. It provides type-safe database access with an intuitive data model, automated migrations, and a powerful query engine.

title: Advanced React Patterns
content: Learn about advanced React patterns including render props, higher-order components, custom hooks, and the compound component pattern. These patterns will help you build more reusable and maintainable components.
